# Jacob Yi

> Full-stack software developer with a background in computer science. Founder of Yi Legacy Ventures; partner at Bull Holdings. Christian, family-focused, building with integrity and long-term thinking.

## About
- Full-stack web and mobile app development, from simple websites to complex applications.
- Technology & AI consulting: web development, SEO, custom software, AI agents and automation.
